intent: Develop a comprehensive mobile fitness tracking application to monitor exercise, nutrition, and physical activity progress.

entities.name: User Profile Module
entities.description: Manages user authentication, personal health metrics, and data privacy settings.

entities.name: Activity Tracking Engine
entities.description: Collects and processes data from mobile device sensors and integrated wearables to monitor exercise sessions.

entities.name: Nutrition Tracker
entities.description: Handles food logging, caloric intake analysis, and macro-nutrient breakdown.

entities.name: Health API Integration Service
entities.description: Acts as a bridge for data synchronization with third-party fitness platforms and external health ecosystems.

entities.name: Data Analytics & Reporting Module
entities.description: Aggregates collected data to provide visual progress reports, trends, and personalized health insights.

architecture.description: The system operates by authenticating the user and establishing a secure session. The mobile app continuously collects sensor data and synchronizes it with third-party wearables via API integrations. This raw data is passed to the tracking and nutrition modules for processing and storage. Finally, the analytics engine pulls this data to generate actionable insights and progress visualizations presented through the user interface.

endpoints.summary: Retrieves the current user profile and privacy settings
Logs a new physical activity session
validation_rules: activity_type must be a valid activity
calories must be a positive number

endpoints.summary: Generates aggregated health and activity trends
Connects to a third-party health data provider

components.content: Register your new account to start tracking health.
View your recent exercise sessions and health trends.
Log a new physical activity session.
Update your personal health metrics and privacy settings.

rules.description: Ensure user authentication state is validated before allowing write operations to health modules.
rules.logic: If UserProfile.session_status == 'authenticated' then allow write access to ActivityTracking and NutritionTracker else reject request with 401 Unauthorized.

rules.description: Data integrity check for sensor readings to prevent anomalous spikes.
rules.logic: If incoming_sensor_data > sensor_threshold_limit then flag as 'anomalous' and exclude from analytics aggregation.

rules.description: Strict state transition for nutrition logging to prevent duplicate entries.
rules.logic: If food_log_entry already exists for user_id at timestamp with same meal_type then return conflict error.

rules.description: Synchronization window management for third-party Health API integrations.
rules.logic: If last_sync_time < current_time - sync_interval then initiate refresh sync else serve cached data.

rules.description: Data privacy compliance validation during analytics aggregation.
rules.logic: If UserProfile.privacy_settings.share_data_with_analytics == false then exclude user_id from dataset processing.
